title: DB: query
description: A database query from the Django ORM or SQLAlchemy. Honeybadger skips queries that match exclude_queries.

query.description: SQL query string. Bind parameters may appear as literals, depending on the driver.

params.description: Query parameters. Only present when include_params is enabled in insights_config.

request_id.description: Request ID from event context, ties this query to the enclosing request.
